content.json:
## For you (owner)
What the pipeline is delivering to you, and how useful it is.

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric == 'keep_rate' | summarize Value=avg(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Lens | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Keep-rate — share of delivered items you engaged with

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric == 'relevance_delivered' | summarize Value=avg(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Lens | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Relevance of what you were sent (avg score of delivered)

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric == 'delivered' | summarize Value=sum(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Lens | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Delivered per profile (0 = a quiet day)

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric in ('engaged_votes','engaged_saves','engaged_clicks','engaged_skips') | summarize Value=max(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Metric | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Engagement gestures (cumulative): votes / saves / clicks / skips

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric in ('cost_usd','eval_cost_usd') | summarize Value=sum(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Metric | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Cost per run (USD) — pipeline + eval

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric == 'topics_total' | summarize Value=max(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Learning breadth — distinct topics in the KB

content.json:
## Pipeline health (ops)
Ingestion, ranking quality, and spend.

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric in ('ingested','ranked','embedded') | summarize Value=sum(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Metric | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Feed funnel — ingested / ranked / embedded (per run)

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric in ('items_total','sources_total') | summarize Value=max(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Metric | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: KB totals — items / sources

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric == 'feeds_failed' | summarize Value=max(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Feeds failing per run (dead / blocked sources)

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric in ('eval_spearman','eval_ndcg5','eval_prec5') | summarize Value=avg(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Metric | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Ranking quality (eval gate): spearman / ndcg5 / prec5

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric == 'eval_nonai_leak' | summarize Value=avg(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Non-AI leak (eval, lower is better)

content.query: AiScoutMetrics_CL | where Metric in ('tokens_prompt','tokens_completion') | summarize Value=sum(Value) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Metric | order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Foundry tokens — prompt / completion (per run)
